name: ADP Workforce Now API
what_it_does: ADP Workforce Now REST APIs for human capital management (HCM) and payroll platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee master data retrieval including organizational hierarchy and employment status, handle payroll data access including earnings, deductions, and pay history, access time and attendance data for workforce management, retrieve benefits enrollment and coverage data for benefits administration, manage HR action and status change workflow integration, handle performance and compensation data access for talent management, access workforce analytics and headcount reporting data, retrieve I-9 and compliance document status for HR compliance, manage position and requisition data for recruiting integration, and integrate HR and payroll data with ERP, analytics, and talent management systems.
use_cases: Retrieving employee data from HR automation agents
Accessing payroll information from finance integration agents
Syncing org hierarchy from workforce planning agents
Tracking time and attendance from operations agents
not_for: Simple time tracking without enterprise HCM and payroll integration
Startups without full ADP Workforce Now HCM suite requirements
Non-US companies without ADP's global payroll reach
best_when: A mid-to-large enterprise using ADP Workforce Now wants AI agents to automate employee data synchronization, payroll analytics, time and attendance integration, benefits management, and HR compliance reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Employee payroll, benefits, and HR data is highly sensitive PII — automated access requires strict need-to-know access controls and GDPR/CCPA compliance. Payroll data automation errors affect employee compensation and require mandatory payroll period correction. HR action automation (terminations, promotions) requires HR manager approval workflows to avoid unauthorized employment changes.

auth.notes: ADP uses OAuth 2.0 with mutual TLS (mTLS) for additional security. Developer portal at developers.adp.com. ADP Labs open-source on GitHub. Webhooks for HR event notifications. REST API with JSON. Roseland, New Jersey HQ. Public (ADP NASDAQ). ADP Marketplace for partner integrations with certification requirement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ADP Workforce Now subscription required for API access
pricing.paid_tiers: API access included with ADP Workforce Now subscription; ADP Marketplace certification for partner apps
pricing.notes: Roseland, New Jersey. Founded 1949. Public (ADP NASDAQ). $18B+ annual revenue. Largest payroll and HR services provider. 900,000+ clients globally. ADP Workforce Now for mid-market (50-10,000 employees). ADP Vantage HCM for enterprise. ADP Marketplace for partner ecosystem. Competes with Workday and Ceridian for HCM market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal; payroll operations have stricter limits

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Employee payroll and HR data requires strict need-to-know access controls; automated bulk data access without business purpose justification violates data privacy policies
mTLS requirement — ADP API requires mutual TLS in addition to OAuth; implement mTLS certificate management properly; certificate expiration causes all API access failures
HR action approval workflows — automated HR actions (terminations, promotions, salary changes) require HR manager approval; bypass causes unauthorized employment changes
Payroll period locking — payroll data access is period-locked after payroll run completion; automated payroll data queries must account for period boundaries
ADP Marketplace certification — partner integrations must pass ADP Marketplace certification; uncertified integrations may have limited access or support
mTLS certificate management — ADP requires per-client mTLS certificates with renewal; build certificate rotation automation before production deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: HCM and payroll. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2 + mTLS. US/EU. Employee PII, payroll, and benefits data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Payroll and HCM. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2 + mTLS. US/EU. Employee payroll and HR data.
